title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Bosch India Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Bosch India Software
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
